source: ako-uctovat.sk, danovecentrum.sk, podnikajte.sk, humanet.sk, financnasprava.sk, uctuj.sk, zrozumitelne-uctovnictvo.com, fintoro.sk
title: Practical Booking Examples (Predkontacie) for s.r.o.

examples.title_sk: Nakup materialu od tuzemskeho dodavatela s DPH
examples.title_en: Purchase of material from domestic supplier with VAT
notes: Alternative: use account 501 instead of 112 if material goes directly to consumption (method B)

examples.title_en: Purchase of material - direct consumption (method B)

examples.title_sk: Nakup materialu z EU - nadobudnutie tovaru
examples.title_en: Purchase of material from EU - intra-community acquisition
notes: Net DPH effect = 0 if fully deductible
Must have valid EU VAT ID of supplier

examples.title_en: Import of material from non-EU country
notes: DPH base = customs value + customs duty
Not reported in KV DPH (customs declaration)

examples.title_en: Purchase of material - non-VAT payer

postings.description_sk: Material na sklad (celkova suma s DPH)
postings.description_en: Material to stock (full amount incl. VAT)

notes: Non-VAT payer cannot deduct DPH
Full amount including DPH is cost of material

examples.title_sk: Nakup sluzieb od tuzemskeho dodavatela s DPH
examples.title_en: Purchase of services from domestic supplier with VAT

examples.title_sk: Nakup sluzieb z EU - reverse charge
examples.title_en: Purchase of services from EU - reverse charge
notes: Place of supply = Slovakia (B2B rule)
Net DPH effect = 0 if fully deductible

examples.title_en: Purchase of services from non-EU country
notes: Same mechanism as EU services
ECB exchange rate applies if invoiced in foreign currency

examples.title_sk: Nakup tovaru na predaj od tuzemskeho dodavatela
examples.title_en: Purchase of goods for resale from domestic supplier
notes: Method A uses 132 (stock). Method B uses 504 (direct expense).

examples.title_sk: Nakup tovaru na predaj z EU
examples.title_en: Purchase of goods for resale from EU supplier
Purchase of machinery - tangible fixed asset
notes: Step 3 occurs when asset is ready for use
Depreciation: 551/082

examples.title_sk: Nakup osobneho auta - pomerny odpocet DPH
examples.title_en: Purchase of passenger vehicle - proportional VAT deduction

postings.description_en: Non-deductible VAT added to asset cost

notes: Non-deductible VAT increases acquisition cost of asset
Proportion must be reviewed annually

examples.title_en: Advance payment to supplier with VAT
notes: DPH arises on advance when payment received by supplier
Supplier must issue tax document within 15 days

examples.title_en: Sale of goods to domestic customer
notes: If customer is non-VAT payer, KV section = D2 (not via ERP) or D1 (via e-kasa)

examples.title_sk: Predaj tovaru do EU - dodanie do EU
examples.title_en: Sale of goods to EU - intra-community supply
notes: No DPH charged - exempt intra-community supply
Must be reported in Suhrnny vykaz (EC Sales List)
Requires valid EU VAT ID of customer

examples.title_en: Retail cash sale via e-kasa
notes: D1 section for sales via electronic cash register (e-kasa/ERP)

examples.title_en: Sale of services to domestic customer
Sale of services to EU customer (B2B)
notes: Place of supply = customer's country (B2B rule)
Invoice must state 'prenesenie danovej povinnosti'
Reported in Suhrnny vykaz

examples.title_en: Sale of services to non-EU customer
notes: Not in Suhrnny vykaz (only EU customers)

examples.title_en: Sale of fully depreciated machine
notes: No residual value expense since fully depreciated

examples.title_en: Sale of partially depreciated vehicle

examples.title_sk: Prijata zaloha od odberatela s DPH
examples.title_en: Advance received from customer with VAT
notes: Must issue tax document within 15 days of receiving advance
DPH obligation arises on advance receipt date

examples.title_en: Purchase of food products at 19% reduced rate
notes: 19% rate applies to selected food products per Annex 7

examples.title_sk: Predaj novín a casopisov so znizenou sadzbou 5%
examples.title_en: Sale of newspapers/periodicals at 5% reduced rate
notes: 5% rate applies to newspapers, periodicals, books per Annex 7a

examples.title_en: Domestic reverse charge - construction services
legal_source: DPH law SS 69 ods. 12 pism. j)
notes: Supplier invoices WITHOUT DPH
Invoice must state reverse charge reference
Net DPH effect = 0 if fully deductible
Account 395 used as clearing; alternatively use 343 analytical accounts

examples.title_sk: Tuzemske samozdanenie - mobilne telefony nad 5000 EUR
examples.title_en: Domestic reverse charge - mobile phones base > 5000 EUR
legal_source: DPH law SS 69 ods. 12 pism. h)
notes: Applies when invoice base >= 5,000 EUR for mobile phones and integrated circuits

examples.title_en: Intra-community acquisition of goods
Triangulation (ABC as intermediary)
notes: No DPH self-assessment by intermediary (simplification)
Suhrnny vykaz code 1 = triangulation

examples.title_en: Exempt financial services (bank fees)
notes: No DPH charged or deducted on exempt financial services

examples.title_en: Exempt rent of residential property
notes: Residential property rental is exempt from DPH

examples.title_en: DPH return settlement - liability to pay

postings.description_en: Payment of DPH to tax office

notes: Uses analytical accounts: 343.vstup, 343.vystup, 343.zuctovanie

examples.title_en: DPH return settlement - excessive deduction (refund)
notes: Tax office returns excessive deduction within 30 days

examples.title_en: Monthly payroll for one employee
notes: Account 336 uses analytical accounts per institution
Payments due by 8th of following month (SP) and by date set by ZP

examples.title_sk: Mzdy s danovym bonusom na dieta
examples.title_en: Payroll with child tax bonus
legal_source: Zakon o dani z prijmov SS 33
notes: This is an additional entry on top of standard payroll
Net salary increases by tax bonus amount

examples.title_en: Straight-line depreciation of machinery
legal_source: Zakon o dani z prijmov SS 26-28
notes: Account 082 for machinery. 081 for buildings. 073 for software.

examples.title_en: Bank charges
notes: Bank services exempt from DPH - no DPH to deduct

examples.title_en: Bank interest received
Year-end closing - transfer profit
notes: 710 = Ucet ziskov a strat
431 = Vysledok hospodarenia v schvalovani
AGM decides on distribution to 428 (retained) or 364 (dividends)

examples.title_en: Prepaid expense (insurance paid in advance)
notes: Account 381 = Naklady buducich obdobi (prepaid expenses)
Dissolved monthly over the period the expense relates to

examples.title_en: Credit note received from supplier
notes: Reversal of original posting
Reduces DPH deduction in current period

examples.title_en: Credit note issued to customer
notes: Reduces output DPH in current period

examples.title_en: Charge note received from supplier (increase)
notes: Same direction as standard received invoice (additional deductible DPH)

A1.condition: Standard issued invoices with all required data

A2.condition: Supplier transfers DPH liability per SS 69 ods. 12

B1.condition: Buyer is person liable to pay DPH (domestic SS 69, EU SS 11, services SS 69 ods. 3)

B2.condition: Domestic supplier, standard DPH deduction claimed

B3_1.condition: e-kasa receipts, fuel receipts, total DPH deduction < 3,000 EUR per period

B3_2.condition: Same docs, total DPH deduction >= 3,000 EUR, reported by supplier

D1.condition: Retail sales through electronic cash register

D2.condition: Sales to non-VAT payers not via ERP (fuel stickers, tickets, etc.)
